calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Emily Foehr appeared via zoom for Kevin Douglas (executor).

The Court waives defective notice issue. Petition for approval if report of executor on waiver of account and for final distribution is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Jaime: Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-21-2024 Continued To Mar-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-21-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated July 17, 2019 is admitted to probate. Kevin G. Douglas is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 2, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Lee. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-17-2023 Continued To Feb-21-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
